facts.f1: The Aurora API gateway listens on port 7443
facts.f2: The Aurora metrics service listens on the port number immediately after the API gateway port
facts.f3: Aurora production releases happen every second Thursday
facts.f4: The Aurora code freeze begins exactly 3 days before each production release
facts.f5: The stormdb database runs on the host named vega
facts.f6: The host vega is mounted in rack R2
facts.f7: Rack R2 is located in the Quito datacenter
facts.f8: The Aurora team lead is Ryn Castellanos
facts.f9: The Aurora on-call rotation is documented in runbook page RB-114
facts.f10: Every Aurora deploy requires approval from the team lead
facts.f11: The flagpole tool manages Aurora feature flags
facts.f12: Aurora feature flags can only be changed during a code freeze
facts.f13: The Aurora error budget is 43 minutes of downtime per month
facts.f14: Aurora has consumed 28 minutes of its error budget this month

preguntas.q: What port does the Aurora API gateway listen on? Answer with just the number.
Who is the Aurora team lead?
How many minutes of downtime per month is the Aurora error budget? Answer with just the number.
Who is the Aurora team lead and in which runbook page is the on-call rotation documented?
Which tool manages Aurora feature flags, and during which period can they be changed?
Who must approve Aurora deploys? Answer with the person's name.
On which host and in which rack does the stormdb database run?
What port does the Aurora metrics service listen on? Answer with just the number.
How many minutes of error budget does Aurora have left this month? Answer with just the number.
On which day of the week does the Aurora code freeze begin?
How many minutes of downtime would exhaust exactly twice Aurora's monthly error budget? Answer with just the number.
In which datacenter is the stormdb database located?
In which datacenter does the host vega live?
In which rack is the stormdb database mounted?

grading: expected_number: último número de la respuesta, igualdad exacta. keywords_all: TODAS las keywords presentes (case-insensitive).

condiciones.R: retrieval real: rag-local colección aurora2, query=pregunta, k=5, umbral 0.35
condiciones.O: contexto oráculo: se inyectan EXACTAMENTE los needed_facts, sin retrieval
